name: Salmon in Red Wine with Apricots
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Pat the salmon dry with towels and dust with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet or roasting pan over medium heat on the stove.
4. Add the salmon and brown on all sides. Remove to a plate and discard oil.
5. Add wine and stock to the skillet and bring to a boil. Return salmon to the skillet,
add apricots, and season with salt and pepper.
6. Place uncovered in the oven and cook for 7 minutes.
7. When done, transfer skillet to the stove top and remove fish to a carving board.
8. Cook liquid in the roasting pan over high heat, stirring until it thickens slightly.
9. Remove from heat and whisk in butter.
10. Cut salmon into half-inch slices, arrange on a serving platter,
and spoon sauce over the salmon.
